name: RADAAR
description:
RADAAR is a powerful social media management and collaboration platform designed for handling multiple brands. It helps your team at every step, from scheduling and publishing posts on their profiles to analyzing their efforts. Built for agencies, RADAAR is a low-cost solution for teams hoping to manage multiple brands effectively for a low cost. 

  • Pricing starts at $9.99/month for 3 profiles.
  • The unified social inbox makes customer engagement a team effort. Ensure that your team is consistently responsive, fostering better relationships with your client’s audience.
  • Social media monitoring enables you to track comments and mentions for your clients
  • The unified dashboard eliminates the juggling act of managing multiple brands. This is best suited for freelancers or smaller agencies that deal with a limited number of clients.
  • Crisis management alerts tune you in to big problems before they get out of hand. Real-time alerts allow you to act swiftly, mitigating potential crises before they escalate.
  • Publish across Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and more

Key features:

✅ Social inbox

✅ Social media monitoring

✅ Crisis management tools
what_people_say:
What people say :

RADAAR is a wonderful, budget-friendly solution for agencies. Here’s what customers have to say:

“Social media management can become very tedious if you don't have a social media management tool. The greatest benefit is Radaar's unified mailbox.”

"RADAAR simplifies managing multiple brands and offers valuable automation features. Its actionable analytics are a game-changer for strategic planning."
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Buggy interface
  • 🚫 Learning curve
  • 🚫 Only suitable for small agencies
